violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Employee washed dishes then went to prepare food without washing hands.
Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Sanitizing solution not at proper concentration. Chlorine Sanitizer at 200ppm. Chlorine sanitizer needs to be at 100ppm.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Chlorine sanitizer for 3 compartment sink was at 200ppm. Chlorine sanitizer need to be 50-100ppm for utensils
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Sanitizer in hand wash sink.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Back splash needs to be permanent. Installed back splash adhered to wall with tape.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Floor requires cleaning.
